- gcc

c_stdlib:

- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
fortran_compiler:
- gfortran

- '14'

- '2'

python:
- 3.10.* *_cpython
target_platform:

zip_keys:
- - c_compiler_version
  - fortran_compiler_version

name: pyhams

about.description: pyHAMS is a python wrapper for HAMS, a boundary element method for hydrodynamic analysis of submerged structures.
pyHAMS is a python wrapper for HAMS, a boundary element method for hydrodynamic analysis of submerged structures.

raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  name: pyhams
  version: "1.3.1"
  build_number: 4

package:
  name: ${{ name }}
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/NLRWindSystems/pyHAMS/archive/v${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 84c4d51df3383c596cd66646a6283cfb75f0afa283f434e5a7ae418f0efbb251

build:
  number: ${{ build_number }}
  skip:
    - match(python, "<3.10")

requirements:
  build:
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then:
        - cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
        - python
        - meson
        - ninja
        - numpy
        - nomkl
        - pkg-config
        - wheel
        - python-build
    - if: not win
      then:
        - ${{ stdlib('c') }}
        - ${{ compiler('c') }}
        - ${{ compiler('fortran') }}
    - if: win
      then:
        - ${{ compiler('m2w64_fortran') }}
        - ${{ compiler('m2w64_c') }}
  host:
    - cython
    - meson
    - numpy
    - pkg-config
    - python
    - python-build
    - pip
    - setuptools
    - if: win
      then:
        - libpython
        - nomkl
    - if: win or osx
      then:
        - llvm-openmp
    - if: linux
      then:
        - libgomp
    
  run:
    - if: win
      then: nomkl
    - python

tests:
  - python:
      imports:
        - pyhams
        - pyhams.pyhams
      pip_check: false
  - files:
      source:
        - test
        - test/Cylinder
        - test/Cylinder/Input
        - test/Cylinder/truth
        - test/Cylinder_headings
        - test/Cylinder_headings/Input
        - test/Cylinder_headings/truth
    requirements:
      run:
        - pytest
    script:
      - cd test && pytest . && cd ..

about:
  license: Apache-2.0
  license_file: LICENSE
  summary: Python module wrapping around HAMS
  description: pyHAMS is a python wrapper for HAMS, a boundary element method for hydrodynamic analysis of submerged structures.
  homepage: https://github.com/NLRWindSystems/pyHAMS
  repository: https://github.com/NLRWindSystems/pyHAMS
  documentation: https://github.com/NLRWindSystems/pyHAMS

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - mattEhall
    - dzalkind
    - gbarter
    - lucas-carmo

about.description: pyHAMS is a python wrapper for HAMS, a boundary element method for hydrodynamic analysis of submerged structures.
